title: Kooxaha
confirmDeleteDescription: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto kooxdan? Tallaabadaan dib looma soo celin karo.

validation.nameRequired: Magaca kooxda waa loo baahan yahay

toasts.deleteSuccess: Kooxda si guul leh ayaa loo tirtiray
